allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('=== TODAY ==='\); print\('date:', d.get\('date'\)\); s=d.get\('stats',{}\); print\('stats:', s\); print\('todos:', len\(d.get\('todos',[]\)\), 'items'\); [print\(f'  - {t[\\"title\\"][:40]}'\) for t in d.get\('todos',[]\)[:5]]; print\('tasks:', len\(d.get\('tasks',[]\)\), 'items'\); [print\(f'  - {t[\\"title\\"][:40]}'\) for t in d.get\('tasks',[]\)[:3]]; print\('habits:', len\(d.get\('habits',[]\)\), 'items'\); print\('review:', 'yes' if d.get\('review'\) else 'none'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('=== OKR ==='\); print\('filter:', d.get\('status'\)\); domains=d.get\('domains',[]\); print\('domains:', len\(domains\)\); [print\(f'  {dm[\\"name\\"][:30]}: {len\(dm.get\(\\"objectives\\",[]\)\)} objectives'\) for dm in domains[:5]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('=== DASHBOARD ==='\); t=d.get\('today',{}\); print\('today stats:', t.get\('stats'\)\); print\('todoList:', len\(t.get\('todoList',[]\)\), 'items'\); [print\(f'  - {x[\\"title\\"][:40]}'\) for x in t.get\('todoList',[]\)[:3]]; print\('okr:', len\(d.get\('okr',[]\)\), 'items'\); [print\(f'  - {x[\\"title\\"][:40]}'\) for x in d.get\('okr',[]\)[:3]]; print\('week:', d.get\('week',{}\).get\('title','none'\)\); print\('knowledge:', len\(d.get\('knowledge',[]\)\), 'tabs'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('=== WEEK ==='\); w=d.get\('week'\); print\('title:', w.get\('title'\) if w else 'none'\); print\('plan:', \(w.get\('plan'\) or ''\)[:60] if w else 'none'\); print\('projects:', len\(w.get\('projects',[]\)\) if w else 0\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('=== OKR \(全部\) ==='\); domains=d.get\('domains',[]\); [print\(f'  {dm[\\"name\\"]}: {len\(dm.get\(\\"objectives\\",[]\)\)} obj'\) for dm in domains[:10]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('system:', 'ok' if d.get\('cpu'\) else 'FAIL'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('dashboard:', 'ok' if d.get\('today'\) else 'FAIL'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('backend:', 'ok' if d.get\('cpu'\) else 'FAIL'\)")
Bash(sed -i '/^# 模型代理快捷命令/,/^alias sm/d' /etc/profile)
Bash(echo "sm 命令已安装，fzf 版本: $\(fzf --version\)")
